propositions: Verify hands-on whether a CLAUDE.md containing a single @AGENTS.md import line loads AGENTS.md into Claude Code's context at launch.
Spike confirmed PASS: on Claude Code v2.1.211 the @AGENTS.md import expanded AGENTS.md into context, returning a canary token verbatim with no approval prompt.
Same-repo @AGENTS.md imports require no approval; only imports outside the project tree prompt once, and import recursion has a max depth of 4 hops.
Decision is to use the @AGENTS.md import pattern with no symlink fallback needed, unblocking downstream stories.
Imports load at launch and do not reduce context, so AGENTS.md must itself remain lean.
Spike is throwaway with no durable code change; no stray spike files left in the working tree.
